text:
BOTTOM LINE — Risk-on, tech led, metals surged, energy tanked.
Nasdaq +1.03%, S&P +0.81%, Dow +0.73% hit records on AI earnings, US-Iran ceasefire easing risks. Gold +3.03%, silver +6.40% rallied amid dollar -0.55% weakness. Flows favored accumulation in XLK +2.66%, breadth narrowed per Goldman Sachs.

INDICES — VIX 17.4 down from 18.29.
QQQ +2.08%, SPY +1.39%, IWM +1.50%, DIA +1.24%. Large > small by 0.58pp. Gold +3.03% most notable cross-asset.

VOLUME — Elevated vol in RSP 1.2x, SLV 1.1x, GLD 1.0x; declining in QQQ 0.9x, IWM 0.8x. SPY vol_ratio implicit in avg 0.97x indices, QQQ 0.9x losing attention. Vol up + price up in metals signals accumulation; low-conviction rally in QQQ despite gains.

SECTORS — XLK Technology +2.66%, XLI Industrials +2.59%, XLB Materials +1.71%, XLY Discretionary +1.52%, XLC Comms +1.49%, XLRE Real Estate +1.29%, XLF Financials +0.48%, XLP Staples +0.21%, XLV Healthcare +0.07%, XLU Utilities -1.42%, XLE Energy -4.12%.
Top industries WGMI +10.19%, SILJ +8.91%; bottom XOP -6.24%, USO -7.09%.

THE 7s — Fab 7 +5.93% (NVDA strongest, ANET -13.61% weakest, clear AI divergence), New Metals 7 +5.68% (SLV strongest, weakest PAAS +0.25%), Old Metals 7 +5.29%, Semi 7 +5.24%, Industrial 7 +4.04%.
Energy 7 -4.47% (XOM weakest), Software 7 -2.50%, Power 7 -1.37%, Insurance 7 -0.71%, Toll Road 7 -0.43%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Jun 17, CME hold 100%. Hawk 6 (Kashkari, Logan), neutral 5 (Powell), dove 4 (Daly). USD liquidity 38/100 normal, reserve scarcity 96th percentile most stressed; TED 0.09%.

POSITIONING — SPY PCR_vol 1.04 elevated protection, skew +4.9% put premium fear. QQQ PCR_vol 1.13, spot above GEX_flip 691. VIX 17.4 below 20d MA 18.3 complacency.

CROSS-ASSET — Oil -7.09% dragged XLE -4.12%, Energy 7 -4.47% despite ceasefire. Gold +3.03%, SLV +6.40% rose on dollar -0.55% despite risk-on.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 59.7 neutral. Top movers AMD +18.37% semis, SLV +6.40% metals, Fab 7 +5.93%. 20d momentum XLK +20.00% best sector, Energy 7 -1.26% worst basket; Semi 7 +49.85% best, Medtech 7 -10.40% worst. Vol spikes RSPD 5.7x +2.04% accumulation, ANET 4.5x -13.61% distribution.

WATCH — AMD +18.37%, AI earnings momentum break. ANET -13.61%, vol 4.5x + Buildout 7 divergence. SLV +6.40%, vol spike + cross-asset gold chain.
